title: Control Widget: Theme & Panels
short_description: Customize your control panel with 200+ aesthetic themes, control widget & panel.
full_description:
Control Widget - Custom Control Panel Themes
Control Widget: themes & panels helps you refresh your Android panel with stylish themes, handy shortcuts, and everyday controls in one place.
Create a custom control panel that matches your wallpaper, icons, widgets, and home screen style. Choose from aesthetic, cute, anime-inspired, cartoon-style, glass, neon, gradient, and other visual control panel themes to make your phone feel more personal.
200+ CONTROL PANEL THEMES
Explore 200+ themed designs for different moods and setups.
- Anime-inspired looks
- K-pop style themes
- Aesthetic and minimalist designs
- Cute and playful styles
- Cartoon-style visuals
- Glass, neon, gradient, and trendy packs
From soft and simple to bold and futuristic, switch themes anytime and keep your quick panel in sync with your Android panel setup.
PERSONALIZE YOUR ANDROID QUICK PANEL
Control Widget is made for users who enjoy phone customization but still want a clean, easy layout. Match your custom control panel with your wallpaper, icons, widgets, or overall phone theme, then change the style whenever you want a fresh look.
DAILY TOOLS AND SHORTCUTS
Control Widget also helps you access common tools and settings more conveniently.
- Adjust brightness and volume
- Open or manage Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and Airplane Mode
- Access Do Not Disturb and other useful shortcuts
- Use flashlight and supported daily tools
- Access screenshot or screen recording features when supported
Feature availability may vary by Android version, device model, and enabled permissions.
WHY CHOOSE CONTROL WIDGET
- 200+ custom control panel themes
- Stylish designs for different moods and setups
- Aesthetic themes that match wallpapers, icons, and widgets
- Simple customization for your Android panel
- Handy shortcuts for everyday control widget features
- Easy theme switching
HOW TO USE
Step 1: Browse the theme library.  
Step 2: Choose a custom control panel theme.  
Step 3: Enable the permissions needed for the features you want to use.  
Step 4: Open your quick panel and enjoy your personalized control widget.
NOTE ABOUT ACCESS PERMISSIONS
Control Widget may use Accessibility Services to support panel display and shortcut actions requested by the user. Some features, such as screenshots or screen recording, may require additional permissions or foreground service access.
Availability may vary by device and Android version. Please review each permission prompt before enabling a feature.
Make your everyday controls feel more personal, useful, and truly yours with the Control Widget.
